⚙️ Model Configuration

{
  "autoencoder": {
    "encoder_dims": [
      128,
      64,
      32
    ],
    "latent_dim": 16,
    "decoder_dims": [
      32,
      64,
      128
    ],
    "activation": "relu",
    "dropout_rate": 0.2,
    "use_batch_norm": true,
    "epochs": 50,
    "batch_size": 256,
    "learning_rate": 0.001,
    "early_stopping_patience": 10,
    "reduce_lr_patience": 5,
    "validation_split": 0.1
  },
  "threshold": {
    "strategy": "percentile",
    "percentile": 95.0,
    "iqr_multiplier": 1.5,
    "zscore_threshold": 3.0
  },
  "ensemble": {
    "use_isolation_forest": true,
    "isolation_contamination": 0.05,
    "ensemble_weight_ae": 0.7,
    "ensemble_weight_if": 0.3
  },
  "persistence": {
    "model_dir": "models/",
    "save_format": "keras"
  }
}
